shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books on weekends.
The weather is perfect for a picnic today.
My favorite hobby is painting landscapes.
I usually cook dinner for my family every night.
Traveling to new places always excites me.
I love trying different cuisines from around the world.
Listening to music helps me focus when studying.
I often volunteer at local shelters and food banks.
Exercising regularly is important for maintaining good health.
Learning a new language can open many opportunities in life.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about study methods.
questions: Q1: What study methods have worked best for you?
Q2: Can you describe any challenges you faced while studying?
Q3: In your opinion, what is the most effective way to study?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone struggling with their studies?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel experiences.
questions: Q1: What is your favorite travel destination and why?
Q2: Have you ever encountered any difficulties while traveling?
Q3: How do you think travel impacts personal growth?
Q4: What tips would you offer for planning a successful trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about environmental awareness.
questions: Q1: How do you practice being environmentally conscious in your life?
Q2: What challenges do you think people face when trying to be eco-friendly?
Q3: Why do you believe environmental awareness is important?
Q4: What actions would you suggest for someone wanting to help the environment?
